title: Bray's Llamas With Hats
description: Give llamas even more personality with new and improved designs when you put carpet on their backs!
body:
# Bray's Llamas with Hats
--------
Inspired by the popular **"Llamas with Hats"** series on YouTube, now you can give llamas even MORE personality when they have a carpet on their backs!

![Llama Showcase 01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4735ecaebb251ee79da7f041a3da682bb9c85b98.png)

Whether you want your llamas to be comfy and cozy with the light gray carpet, or cosplaying as Endermen with the purple carpet, there is bound to be something fun to try on for size!

**NOTE:** Not all carpet designs are currently finished but will be coming very shortly in an update! Fresh Animation support will also be implemented when all designs are done.
### Carpet Designs
* White
* ~~Light Gray~~
* ~~Gray~~
* ~~Black~~
* Brown
* ~~Red~~
* Orange
* ~~Yellow~~
* Lime
* ~~Green~~
* Cyan
* Light Blue
* ~~Blue~~
* ~~Purple~~
* Magenta
* Pink
* Trader Llama
* Secret Designs?


---------------

# [Check out my other work!](https://modrinth.com/user/Braytonks)

[![Bray's World Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb564d2b41517ff14a0ef541c06bbd61cbb8ac96.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld)

### Bray's World: A Vanilla+ Experience!
I love all of my packs but ["Bray's World"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld) is definitely my baby <3 If you like the quality of what you see here, please feel free to check that pack out. It does a little bit of everything including custom textures and models, variated mob textures, animations and more, and even has support for [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) so there's plenty of settings to toggle to get exactly what you want!

<center>

# THANK YOU!
